title: Abracadabra - Rekt III
relevance_summary: Deprecated contract used for unauthorized minting of unbacked stablecoins

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls cook() with action IDs 0 and 1 in the same tx.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls cook() with action IDs 0 and 1 in the same tx.
summary: Abracadabra suffered a $1.8 million loss due to a vulnerability in deprecated CauldronV4 contracts where a simple two-action sequence could bypass the insolvency check. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
